titleStmt.title: SII 26.320: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 320. (A.R. No. 302 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Sundarapāṇḍyadēva: Year 13+1, Kaṟkaṭaka (Āḍi)-ba. 10, Monday, Kārttikai = 1290 A.D., July 3.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of a nandā lamp and a standing lamp to the temple of the god Tiruvālakkōyiluḍaiyanāyaṉār of Tirukkachchūr in Śeṅguṉṟa-nāḍu in Kaḷattūr-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, by Śiṟṟēṟiuḍaiyāṉ Tulaiyāḍa selvaṉ alias Chittiramēḻi-vēḷāṉ, the karaṇattāṉ of Maṇanallūr alias Vīraśōḻa-chchatuṟuvēdimaṅgalam in Śembūṟ-kōṭṭam in the same Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōla-maṇḍalam. He gave 30 cows and a bull to provide for this which were accepted by the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple who had agreed to burn the sandhi lamp accordingly.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmaṟ kirttikkumel koccaṭapanmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu 10 3vatukku Etirāmā
ṇṭu kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu teśamiyum tiṅkaḷkkiḻamaiyum peṟṟakārttikai nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kaḷattūṟ
koṭṭattuc ceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭut tirukkaccūr Uṭaiyār tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Immaṇṭalattu cempūṟkoṭṭattu(m)
maṇanallūrāṉa viracoḻaccatuṟuvetimaṅkalattu karaṇattāṉ ciṟṟeṟiuṭaiyāṉ tulaiyātacelvaṉāṉa cittirameḻiveḷāṉ
vaitta tirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟukkum tirukkuttuviḷakku Oṉṟukkum Ittirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟukku viṭṭa pacu muppatu Iṣapam Oṉṟum
Ikkoyil kāṇi Uṭaiya civappirāmaṇarom kaikkoṇṭu Ittirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟum cantirātittavarai Erippatāka cilāle
kai paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ikkoyil kāṇi Uṭaiya civappirāmaṇarom Itu śrīmāheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.320 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
